  "videoTitle": "Foundations of Ancient and Colonial Burma Walkthrough",
  "content": "Explore the foundations of Ancient and Colonial Burma with key highlights from Bagan's cultural significance and the impact of British colonial policies.\n- Ancient Burma, known as Bagan, was a center of culture and power.\n- The Pagan Kingdom established Buddhism as a state religion.\n- Colonial Burma was influenced by British imperial policies.\n- Key events shaped the transition from ancient to colonial times.",
  "videoWebUrl": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Z2K9vO9A8s"
}
